description: Composition Blue kurta made of a 100% cotton, has three-quarter sleeves with woven tape detailing on the hem, round neck with a slit neckline, half buttoned placket, woven tape detailing on the chest and sequin work along the neckline Fit Regular Wash care Dry clean only This kurta by diva  is designed to accentuate your femininity, combining traditional prints with a modern silhouette. Look stylish in this ethnic kurti and revel in the comfort of the soft fabric. Pair it with leggings and heels for a formal look or wear it with denims and flats for an off-duty look. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 5’9”, chest 33” and shoulders 15.5”
